title: roystonea elata
intro: Roystonea elata, also known as the Cuban royal palm, is a species of palm tree native to Cuba. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Roystonea elata include reducing fever and inflammation, as well as treating various skin conditions such as acne and wounds. Herbal preparations of Roystonea elata include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
